subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Beloved! Verily this servant of Thine, who hath been enraptured by the breeze wafting from the gardens of Thy divinity and set ablaze by the fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و محبوبی ان عبدک الذی انجذب بنسیم ریاض الوهیتک و اشتعل بالنار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death
